infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TrailConnect uses your location to track hikes and show friends' locations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TrailConnect uses your location to track hikes and share with emergency contacts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TrailConnect uses your camera to capture trail photos and scan QR codes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TrailConnect uses your photos to share hiking experiences.
